explanation: Framework of bones providing structure and protection.
Column of vertebrae protecting spinal cord.
Bony structure protecting heart and lungs.
Bones longer than wide; femur, humerus.
Smooth tissue covering ends of bones.
Muscle in upper arm; flexes elbow.
Muscle in upper arm; extends elbow.
Blood vessels carrying blood away from heart.
Blood vessels carrying blood to heart.
Tubes branching from trachea to lungs.
Tiny air sacs; site of gas exchange.
Organ absorbing water and forming waste.
Inner layer; contains blood vessels and nerves.
Returns fluid to blood; immune defense.
